name: SQLite
description: SQLite is a self-contained, serverless, zero-configuration SQL database engine. It is the most widely deployed database in the world, embedded in every mobile OS, every browser, and countless applications. SQLite is ACID-compliant, uses a single-file B-Tree format, and supports most of SQL-92.
core_strengths: Universally supported across all platforms and languages
Single-file database, easy to copy and backup
Full SQL support with extensions (FTS5, JSON, Geo)
best_use_cases: Local data for CLI tools and MCP servers
remarks: SQLite uses a single-writer model by default. Enable Write-Ahead Logging (WAL) mode for concurrent reads during writes. Heavy write queues may need additional tuning (auto-vacuum, page size). Not suited for high-concurrency write workloads.
